creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Slawomir Wojciech Wojtczak from comment #2)
> I just updated the Ports tree and rebuild the devel/dbus.

There's more than one DBus library implementation. In this case the fix affects DBus implementation within devel/glib20. For example, x11-fm/caja mentioned in your blog doesn't directly depend on devel/dbus.
